backend_upgrade_plan.core_principle: Decoupled Observation - System B observing System A

tasks.name: Telemetry Proxy Service
tasks.description: Implement Redis Subscriber to listen to Target's 'phys_telemetry'. Rebroadcast as SSE to Frontend. Ensures zero coupling with Target.

tasks.name: Scanner Trigger Endpoint
tasks.description: POST /api/scan. Triggers Python Static Analysis script on the mounted read-only volume (/mnt/target).

tasks.name: AI Orchestrator Proxy
tasks.description: POST /api/analyze. Proxies requests to local LM Studio instance. Centralizes API keys and model config.

tasks.name: Vector DB Integration
tasks.description: Implement ChromaDB ingestion for 'Category A-D' notebooks. Extract 'Friction Points' and 'Remedies'.

tasks.name: Confidence Logic
tasks.description: Implement calculation logic for 'Resolution Rate' and 'Recurrence' to feed the KnowledgeConfidenceBar.

tasks.name: Asset Pipeline
tasks.description: Node.js script to ingest SVGs -> Optimize (SVGO) -> Output 'iconset.ts' to Frontend.

tasks.name: Axiom 2 Verification
tasks.description: Refine AST parsing to detect 'jax.lax.scan' missing 'init' args. Feeds the SignalLayer.

tasks.name: Session Logging
tasks.description: Log timestamped events (Scan Start, Warning, Fix) to temporary session store for SessionTimeline.
